holdings.infoBox: REMX is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are PLS Group stock at 8.66%, Albemarle at 8.17%, Lynas Rare Earths at 6.90%, China Northern Rare Earth (Group) High-Tech Co.,Ltd at 6.79%, and Liontown at 6.04%.

overview.description: The VanEck Rare Earth and Strategic Metals ETF (REMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks an index of global companies that mine, refine, or recycle rare earth and strategic metals. REMX was launched on Oct 27, 2010 and is issued by VanEck.
